fields.name: Cost Adjustment Run Guid
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique identifier of the cost adjustment run.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date and time of the cost adjustment run for the item.

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date and time of the cost adjustment run for the item.

fields.name: Duration
fields.tooltip: Specifies the duration of the cost adjustment run for the item.
